name: Marwynn Holdings, Inc.
business: Marwynn Holdings operates two segments: FuAn provides food and beverage supply chain and brand management services, distributing Asian food and non-alcoholic beverages to U.S. mainstream markets, grocery stores, and warehouse clubs. Grand Forest provides indoor home improvement products, including kitchen cabinets, flooring, and countertops, sourced from international suppliers and sold to homeowners, interior designers, and dealers.

exposures.sentence: FuAn is a food and beverage supply chain company that specializes in connecting businesses between different regions, particularly between Asia and the U.S.
We purchase, distribute and sell a wide range of food and non-alcoholic beverages through our supply chain platform.
Grand Forest is an indoor home improvement supply chain provider that focuses on providing high-quality kitchen cabinets, flooring, and home improvement products sourced from international suppliers.
Our product catalog is also available on our website www.grandforestcabinets.com.

tamClaims.claim: The market size by revenue generated by companies providing supply chain management, brand management, and supply chain finance solutions to the packaged food and non-alcoholic beverage industry has increased from $124.6 billion in 2019 to $149.3 billion in 2023, representing a CAGR of approximately 4.6%. In the longer term, the market is forecast to reach $207.3 billion by 2028, with a CAGR of 6.6% from 2024 to 2028.
